name: product-manager-os
description: A complete operating system for product managers. Ships 18 battle-tested skills across the full product lifecycle — discovery (customer-interview, synthesize-research, personas, opportunity-solution-tree, product-brainstorm), strategy (product-strategy, positioning, competitive-brief), execution (write-spec, prioritize, okrs, roadmap, user-stories, sprint-planning), and launch/measure/communicate (launch-plan, metrics-review, stakeholder-update, meeting-notes) — plus a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a learning memory system, and ready-to-wire automations. From The Product Channel by Sid Saladi.
